summary: Added debug overlay toggled by ?debug query param showing FPS, active mode name, point count, bass and treble values. Created debugOverlay.ts with throttled DOM updates, extended LoopDeps with onDebugFrame/getModeName/getPointCount callbacks, added CSS styling (fixed position, monospace, pointer-events none, z-index 30), and wired everything in main.ts. No raw visitor identifiers exposed, disabled by default.
